**Checklist**

- [ ] Code is formatted (`ruff format .`) and lint-clean (`ruff check .`)
- [ ] Type hints pass `mypy` on changed files
- [ ] New code has tests; `pytest` passes locally
- [ ] No real PHI, institutional credentials, or API keys in the diff
- [ ] `CHANGELOG.md` updated if this is a notable addition (minor / patch)
- [ ] Module `README.md` updated if the public API changed
